reviews.review_description: Best flying game yet it's realistic if you like top gun then this is for you

I really like this game at first. And I still do really. But they never do any updates.. I never had any new planes. I never knew helicopters which I would love. It’s the same old boring ones. They fun to have some new places to explore. Is it worth the money absolutely.

I don't like how you have to buy the airport before getting the plane it's super annoying and I want the helicopter but soon as I reached 50,000 it had me by the airport I don't want to buy it please make it to where you don't have to buy the airport and you can buy whatever you want

Its like if someone took a concept you like and turned it into straight rage bait like the planes controls are amazing but its like they decided to just stop putting in effort like the ops missions are decently ok till you unlock the comet then they just kinda suck and the ring courses are terrible like who cares about flying through a ring in a dogfighting plane this game is like buying half a Lego set if they took the controls and made a game where you could pick any of the planes and just get into dogfights with cpus it would be way better but honestly don't waste your time

reviews.review_title: Nobody likes your stupid ring course
reviews.review_description: I dont want to spend my whole campaign flying through rings in the sky. Find something better to do. But shooting down drones while flying through rings? That is the STUPIDEST thing I have ever seen. And for now that's all I can do until I unlock the next plane. But the flying mechanics are still good. It's an ok game but seriously, find a better idea than these stupid ring courses

I bought the game, and am a fan of similar flying games, but this one is very limited and gets boring quickly.  A lot of grinding to get money before you can advance, and the non dog-fighting missions are, imo, boring and complex - such as flying the plane through rings or shooting down balloons before the timer runs out. Free fliight seems pointless and gets very boring quickly.

I love this game it’s one of my favs I’ve had it for a pretty long time but you should update some more, because I’ve completed all of the missions and now I just play online which is really fun but I’ve loved all the missions and I would love for another update

I installed it for my son, he love planes. He got frustrated because after doing all the pre-flights he kept clicking on the engine start and at first it turns on and immediately off then it wouldn't even budge. We could do everything else

Reply to Developer: Sometimes it engages sometimes your hand is already passing through it, it doesn't budge. Sometimes my helmet can trigger it off when Im too close to it. Do you need to press any buttons to trigger it? Because if a helmet can turn it off maybe buttons were not needed

developer_response.body: The ignition works like a real ignition which means you need to hold it for a second to fully let the engine ignite.

reviews.review_description:
I thought it wa
s an amazing game. I was able to learn how to fly and work the controller. In short the game is fun. I thought the graphics  was great and the wave the game taught you how to fly in and out of the circles, balloons, and other objects.

Very excellent VR app. Highly recommended.

Place a flashlight or a toy kaleidoscope tube or the like through the strap of the right hand VR hand grip. Then place the entire set up under your legs stretch straight out and not too far forward or too far backward off course. You can intuit it. 
This creates a structural realism.
Doesn't teach you anything you are just by yourself you crash each time and you can't even go onto another mission pisses me off they should delete this game

The controls feel really good and there is a lot of content to go with this game. Nothing like being in a cockpit and looking out the window to see the expanse of the plane's wing as you soar off. If you're looking for a flight simulator for standalone, then this is it! The only problem I have is the graphics and lack of detail in the islands and towns you fly over. They are abysmal. However, I still think the game is well worth it to scratch that flight simulator itch.
This game is super cool and feels realistic. I play war thinder and this game feels like I’m in it! Totally recommend, it does make you pretty dizzy at first but you get used to it. 😉
All I wanted to do was fly with the planes. but now I haft do buy airport and to missions and blah blah blah. It is just a really big cash grab
How am i expected to win a mission in an ultralight with fighters an air defenses in every corner?
If you love anything flying this game is for you. It’s absolutely a blast. Note though this game is not for the faint of the ones who may have motion sickness.

Way better than expected. Having flown real planes I can say this game hits a good balance between realism and fun. 
I just can't understand why there aren't more aircraft. This game is crying out for an Apache or an F16!
Once you get used to being in the cockpit it tones down the disorientation. The only trouble I have is turning on the toggle switches to start the aircraft. Other than that 5 stars
Gives very realistic experience . Never try standing
The controls and visuals are nice and the dogfighting is the best thing I’ve ever played my only problem is that there aren’t enough planes.
Really fun pretty relaxing I don’t know got to leave the first airport but I will figure it out great game

reviews.review_title: Didn't expect to be this good.
reviews.review_description: I was looking for a good plane standalone game, this was the last one I bought because the cartoons graphics made me think it's not realistic, but it is the best plane simulator you can get. The weight distribution, the difference in speed when flying different planes, it's just perfect. And the maps feel more alive then I imagined.

I love the Game
I even landed the Light Plane (idk how its Called) on top of the Buildings
But there are some bugs 
Like when you land the Helicopter in the License job and miss the landing spot 
It bugs and Says that you passed the Game
And Also on the Heli l, if you fly and Look back 
The Tail completely disappears

I liked the game. At first a bit boring but further more it escalates and becomes very interesting.
Also I like the jokes that intercom tells to pilot each time he accomplished something.
This is a great game but I would love if they added bombers and bomber missions this would make the game so much better but other than that it’s amazing

I was play i wanted comet but it made me buy the airport i don't want to 2 in order to even buy the airport you have to land im terrible at landing at least a skip landing or just make it all buyable sorry for my terrible spelling

reviews.review_title: Great but not many Please read dev
reviews.review_description: this game is the best i can find of flying but it needs fighter jets and the plane shuold be whole and should have a damage model instead of one piece crash like you hit a runaway i should lose a wing and then die
After launching the game , it stocks in ( push any button screen).

this is one of the best flight simulator for the quest tons of achivments to unlock ranging from hard to easy i do wish it had more planes and also wish you didn't have to buy new airports to unlock them overall great game

The game itself is good and the PVP is very fun if you know what you're doing but it definitely has its issues. the main issue of which is when the host leaves it kicks everyone out of the server completely stopping any fun randomly. Also I don't know if anyone else has experienced it but my audio has completely cut out three different times requiring a full game restart to fix.
good at first but once you play the game it's annoying
i have looked and looked for people to play with i cannot find anyone. how is the game already dead? it's meta's game of the month
I can't get the engine to start i couldn't refuel

I bought this game because im a big fan of flying simulators, but other then a small part ofnjobs, and the freeflight mode, this game is really bad.
Not only because of the bugs, but even for the expierience, and I dint think its worth 20$.
One of the bugs that I had was in the job: Spot lanindg, for the pheonix, where, even when I finished the task, it said that I failed.
So if you want to have the best fly performance, dont buy this game!

developer_response.body: Please follow the instructions in Land mode.  You have to bring the vehicle to a complete stop within the time listed on the tablet for it to be considered a success.

reviews.review_description: At first I was super motion sick but I got over it really fast super fun game

good game......not DOJs....but very good flying game❤️
.......even much better on sales👍🏼

Great chair flying game. 

Any chance to add Localizers and Glideslopes to runways, PAPIs maybe also? Would make the simulation more fun. Extra little thing to do and focus on.
I love this game and all but there is a lot of bugs and after a while it’s not as fun so if the owner could please ad a build mode I think it would be really cool

reviews.review_title: Need to be more of a  physics for it
reviews.review_description: I’ve crashed many times trying to quickly recover max throttle my had would go straight through the throttle and due to lake of power I can’t stabilise the aircraft and crash at low altitudes it’s very difficult to stay low in dogfights but apart from that very simple easy to get the hang of when newly flying the aircraft fun the shooting things

This is by far one of the most fun simulators that I like to play. Realistic enough for flight enthusiasts with fun jobs and missions. I really enjoy the chopper, was wondering if there are any future plans for more add-ons? Another helicopter would be great. Perhaps a tandem rotor or something for search and rescue, firefighting, etc. would be awesome. Also some island add-ons would be exciting. A sea plane would be fun.
Just throwing out some recommendations and ideas.
Thanks for the fun and escape!!

reviews.review_title: Game is alright but don't buy the kodiak
reviews.review_description: The game itself is ok, it's pretty fun to dog fight but the kodiak "racer" is so slow, for 5 bucks I thought it would be faster and be better to maneuver but in reality it is basically the stallion with a different look...don't buy the kodiak.

reviews.review_title: cool game but i feell like its dead
reviews.review_description: when i join multiplayer there no one playing

reviews.review_title: Bit of a fun aircraft simulator
reviews.review_description: The aircraft are easy to use it does feel realistic although the cartoon graphics aren't. It's great if you want fly around and shoot things the jobs can be repetitive to get to new airports but over all it's fun to play and complete the war missions....

I am a bit of a lover of airplane simulators and this game has it all. Multiplayer, jobs, dogfights, and much more. At one point you can purchase a helicopter. If you are looking for a game where you can do stuff like shooting down your friends to free flying by yourself, then this is the game for you. 😃
Just got the game and absolutely love it. Easy to control, lots of missions, free flight, everything you want in an airplane game!!!!!

It's pretty basic cheep fun.  I have some minor quibbles about how there are missing instruments on the pannel (vsi) the big MFD in the middle of everything seems a little silly and redundant and isn't actually all that useful and the modeling of the aerodynamics feels just far enough off to make it a little tricky for someome who is very familiar with how an aircraft in flight actualy behaves... but for what it is, it actually does rather well.  It's not full arcade mode (the plane will stall if you try to go vertical) but it's not X-Plane either.  It's somewhere in between.  Good for joyriding, which I think is the point, here.

This game is fun and realistic with jobs, dogfights, different planes and free flight. 
Would recommend buying!!!
Very fun but the price is kindda pricey, but other than the price it’s so worth playing it, especially if your friends play it

Brilliant game! Love it so much! Great fun. Chill as typically played sat down (I even like to lie on my bed, feels even more realistic!) 
Really shows how great VR gaming is!
Doesn’t work
For a second while playing, I thought I was Maverick.  Incredible game!
This game gave me motion sickness. Can't really say if it's good or bad, but it's not for me.

I've enjoyed this series since the Gear VR/Oculus Go version.  I find the physics and flight characteristics of the planes to be similar enough to the big PC sims to really enjoy. The mini games keep it interesting.   I've always wished they add cross wind landings, but that might be missing out on the point of this game that's enjoyment is largely on part of flying in great to slightly rainy weather. 

Also I noticed, that as my skills improve it crosses over to other VR flight sims.

Oh, and I love the new helicopter! Yes it's easier to fly than a Robinson on MS flt sim, but without pedals the realism would just be frustrating. So I'm happy with this compromise.

reviews.review_title: Way better than the first Ultrawings!!!
reviews.review_description: I can't say enough about this game, I love it! I honestly don't know what the difference is with the movement, but with this game I don't feel motion sickness like I did with the first! I'm hooked!

I really like this one! I was hardly using my Oculus VR till I trying the demo for this game and I really liked it! It felt like I was really flying a plane! It felt like I could feel every turn and sometimes sitting on my bed playing this game it felt like I was sinking into the mattress some!
 Soon after my demo expired I had to buy this and the add-on haven't tried out the add-on yet but, I know it will be great! 
  Definitely buy this game if you're looking for that realistic feeling!

May have to refund and re-purchase through steam just for controler support

And plains.
I have played 100% 5 or 6 times

I think the game was pretty good for while it lasted and then I started to get sick while I was playing the game and it kept happening and I wanted a refund and it was wild the return policy so I was eligible for a return and I get no response and I waited over a month and nobody will respond and I just want my 20 bucks back so I can use it to do something else rather than having to buy my money back and I get no reason why I can’t get a refund and I’m clueless

reviews.review_title: All saved data were removed! Help!
reviews.review_description:
The game is great but please restore all my records including purchased airports and airplanes. I saved in the 'Yellow' disk.  I submitted a ticket to the Help center last week but never be replied. 
zenzulu1995

Teaches these basics of flying a glider. 
It’s really good for beginners trying out aviation and gives an overall idea of what flying is like and how it works. 

It kind of sucks trying to play online, since no one is ever online so most of the time you only play solo.

If I were you I would get the free demo first because the game could be unenjoyable for people who get motion sick really easy.

This seems to have quite a bit of the same elements to real flying. Learning the throttles, engine acceleration,  maneuvers n tasks that come along. Deff get harder as they go on but you get to learn how to control the plane even more. 

At first you feel in a way nauseous experiencing flight but I’ve gotten used to it where I can fully enjoy it. I’ve even learned how to do a better barrel roll without going all over the place at first. 

It would be awesome to have somewhat more of a realistic world with the trees n buildings. Either way Deff worth getting!
I love to just fly around in free flight. The missions are really fun too. I like that the add on features are not needed to enjoy the game. It does a good job with physics and comfort.

reviews.review_title: The most fun I've had in a while!!
reviews.review_description:
I love flying on MS Flight Sim on the Series X, but flying in VR on this game is another level!! Yes the graphics aren't photorealistic but I don't think I've ever been as excited when playing a game!

The VR controls and haptic feedback is spot on and makes you feel like you're geniunely flying. This game is a must for anyone who likes to fly!!!

reviews.review_title: Great game, sucky support from developer
reviews.review_description:
I've played this game regularly for a couple of years. Almost daily, actually, since I started playing the multi-player feature within the game. The game is an absolute blast to play, although I went through all the single player modes twice , and all I do now is multiplayer. It’s so much fun when you chat with your friends in multiplayer mode, which does require a lot of skill and patience  to master   

The multi-player feature has been gaining a lot of new players in recent months, but unfortunately there are severe bugs in multi-player, mostly related to audio issues, such as the audio completely shutting off, after which you have to restart the game completely to recover .

 Unfortunately the developers have abandoned this game, claiming that they can’t make any fixes for some reason that I don’t believe. What a shame, it’s a great game that has just one or two bad bugs that are very frustrating.

Sat in the cockpit for the first time last night. Didn't know what the..... to do.After studying the controls, I got the plane started for a free flight run . After numerous non takeoffs and crashes, I finally took it to air. With multiple unintentional spins and loops , I gained control only to crash while attempting a landing. Studied the cockpit controls again . Took off without paying much attention to altitude/level meter. Flew by eyesight. Kept nose level and pulled back on throttle  during a landing . lowered flap after touchdown..I was a bit off runway strip but landed without a crash. I kept the wheels lowered during the test flight. I'm gonna keep practicing.This is an awesome experience for those who want to know the bare basics to the full complexity of flying a plane.

This game is AMAZING, I have never experienced any bugs, the progression is easy, but also challenging at parts, which make it a fun mix, the ops mode was amazing!! the helicopter takes some skill, but once you learn it, it’s amazing!!!
Every time I get on I can never save my progress.  So when I get off for a little then get back on I have to restart everything.  Overall it is a very good game but I wish I could save it.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
There are 4 save slots.  They are represented as save discs that you grab and put into the computer when you start the game.  Make sure you are loading the same one.

reviews.review_description: I thought the game mechanics and graphics were good but sub par relative to even the cheapest oculus games made on app lab. The flying and landing is definitely the most fun part of the game but In order to unlock the few planes they have, you first have to go through a bunch of really annoying challenges. So it ends up feeling like an iPhone game brought over to oculus. There isn’t much freedom and if you aren’t doing challenges then there’s not much to do but fly around. I was looking for a flight sim so I could just go flying and explore some open world platform. It definitely has the potential to be that and much more but the execution of this particular game and much of the content in it seems very very sloppy. It’s not worth $20 I wouldn’t waste it on this. If it was only like $10, this review would be glowing, but as it is, it’s overpriced, overrated and seriously underdeveloped

This game is so fun, and I love how realistic it feels. The controls are clean, and I just love dogfighting. The tutorials aren’t like most tutorials, they let you do all of the flying, which is really nice. Such a great game.

I really hate how games with poor instructional implementations get a pass because of nostalgia or VR.   First mission my plane keeps diving right now matter how hard I push the joystick left (even though the stick is visibly moving to the left on screen).    But after like 6 crashes I found that if I move my seat a foot to the left it helps even though the visual queues are no different.  Add to that you have to go back to the meaningless pilot training room and reselect the mission then put on your dumb helmet to replay that same part (2+ completely unnecessary steps).   If I'm missing something it's because the tutorial failed to tell me.  This is no Pilot Wings....

developer_response.body: You can control the aircraft two different ways.  1) Motion controls and 2) Using the right analog stick on the Touch controller.  If your thumb is resting on the analog stick and you are inadvertently pushing on it this could be the cause of the issue you are seeing.  Email us at support@bitplanetgames.com if you need further assistance.

reviews.review_description: I performed the cheat to get $500000. Bought a airport. Left the game too good to a birthday party. Came back and now it says I am -$114000. I perform a job and then my bank says $0. My bank stays at $0 after that no matter what I do. Will change my star count to 5 when it gets fixed. Love this game but can’t play with it earning any money.

developer_response.body:
Use the cheat code again.  You can use it as many times as you want!

Get latest version. This is now fixed.

reviews.review_title: Sorry, but just not for me
reviews.review_description: I may have overlooked it, but some flight school training is needed.  One minute in and I've crashed twice and been upside down and am feeling nauseated.  Giving this one up before it gets any worse.  I should have tried the free trial first and saved the bother of requesting a refund.

developer_response.body: So you one star us?  Why bother?

reviews.review_description:
... but all the locked things are frustrating. 
If I don't want (and don't like!) to fly on Comet, how should I move further? Well, I don't know. But those plane just makes me mad while I LOVE the first two. 
I am ready to buy an Unlock-All DLC, just make it. Don't make everything free, make an option to buy vehicle or unlock airport. Just don't make people do every single mission to move further

Sick game

Let me know if possible please it would mean the world to if one was accepted but if not I understand

reviews.review_title: Works as a Flight Sim Fails as a Game
reviews.review_description:
Ultrawings 2 does a great job giving you a genuine feeling of flight. It carries over just enough complexity to give it a taste of reality, but no so much that it becomes tedious. Taking off and flying over the game's various islands is a truly exhilarating feeling that reminds you why VR exists in the first place.

But that's it. As soon as you step outside of that, you run up against a series of baffling decisions that you'd think would be highlighted as "don'ts" in game design 101. For example, the game's jobs and ops (the only way to earn money) are just as likely to center on the thrill of conserving ammunition and managing your fuel supply as they are to test your ability to deftly pilot an aircraft through an obstacle course or best an opponent in a dog fight. Worse, when the time comes to open up new islands (airports) in the game, you do so by flying over open water to them. That means (at least in the first example) pointing your plane in one direction and waiting (literally) five minutes while the island slowly grows larger in your field of view. Sure, you can do a couple of barrel rolls and maybe a loop the loop along the way, but too much of that and you'll run out of fuel and have to start the "sit still and don't do anything" mission all over.

I'd say the worst aspect of the game is that it doesn't tell you why you failed. Did I run out of fuel? Did I run out of ammo? Were my landing gear not lowered? Was the landing too steep? Who knows. All it tells you is that you failed. If you crash, it'll at least vaguely clue you into what you crashed into (no, that's not always obvious), but other than that, you're on your own.

The game's basic engine is solid and the graphics are about as good as you can expect on the Quest 2, but the gameplay leaves enough to be desired that I wouldn't recommend it.

developer_response.body:
Normally, we wouldn't comment on a review like this is because reviews are subjective but in this instance we feel its necessary to point out some incorrect information (or maybe you are simply unaware of a few features).

1)Dog-fight while conserving ammo.  Fly through rings while up against the clock. Sorry you're not a fan but we are not sure why you're baffled given the game's store page.

2) Airport flying times are entirely dependent on what aircraft you are in.  If you fly the slower Ultralight its going to take you longer to reach your destination vs. the Stallion (which is bought in the first office) or the Comet.  In the latter two aircraft it only takes 2 - 3 min. 

3) We absolutely do tell you why you failed -- in the office.  So, if you fail a mission once you're back in the office the game displays why you failed directly in front of you, on the Projector screen.

reviews.review_description:
Is this the most complete flying game on quest? Yes. 

Does it still feel empty and missing a lot of key features? Also yes. 


It really needs a few more modes to justify the price. Could you add races against bots? or Multiplayer? Or a collectathon mode where you collect coins in hard to reach places?

Also going back to the menu after every 2 minute mission gets pretty annoying. Can you add a "next" button on the tablet in the plane? 

5/10 - needs more content

developer_response.body:
The game has over 300 missions / 40 hours of content if you want to just to "beat" it and well over 60 if you want to Gold medal everything.  That's a LOT of content for 24.99.  

Also, competitive dogfighting is coming. Hang tight.

reviews.review_title: Love the game but few suggestions
reviews.review_description: I love the game a lot but left hand controls would be amazing. Adding custom colors and decals to the plane would be great. Aircraft carriers would also be fun. And an amphibious aircraft would be amazing.
